frames.action: Один из соседей обращается к Хамзе.
frames.dialogue: СОСЕД: Хамза. Гул был с того склона. С озера.
frames.prompt_en:
A medium close-up cinematic still frame from a 3D animated feature film.
Featuring Aslan, a middle-aged mountain villager with a weathered face and a plain worn jacket — exactly as in reference image 1; keep his face, hair and outfit identical to the reference.
He leans in slightly and speaks to Hamza with a grave, worried expression, brows drawn together.
Setting: the courtyard of Hamza's stone house in a mountain village, midday (as in reference image 2).
Camera: eye-level medium close-up, shallow depth of field, Aslan framed from the chest up on the right third of the frame.
Lighting: bright natural mountain daylight with soft clear shadows, cool sky fill and warm stone tones, calm subdued atmosphere.
Style: rendered as a 3D animated feature film still — stylized appealing proportions with large expressive eyes, soft global illumination, gentle subsurface scattering on the skin, clean detailed materials, cinematic depth of field, warm-cool color contrast, high render quality.
16:9 widescreen framing, clean frame with no text, captions, subtitles, logos or watermarks.

Featuring Hamza, an old weathered mountain elder with a grey beard, a long dark coat and a wooden staff — exactly as in reference image 1; keep his face, hair and outfit identical to the reference.

frames.action: Амин достаёт куртку и накидывает её на Тако; Тако тонет в ней, рукава до колен.
frames.prompt_en:
A wide shot cinematic still frame from a 3D animated feature film.
Featuring Amin, a lean resolute teenage boy — exactly as in reference image 1; keep his face, hair and outfit identical to the reference. Beside him is Tako, a very small young boy — exactly as in reference image 2; keep his face, hair and outfit identical to the reference.
Amin drapes his own oversized jacket over tiny Tako, who is swallowed by it with the sleeves hanging past his knees; Amin's face is protective and matter-of-fact, Tako looks up small and grateful. The jacket matches reference image 3.
Setting: the edge of a fresh landslide high in the mountains, a raw scar of broken earth below and a precipice beyond, overcast day (as in reference image 4).
Camera: eye-level wide shot, deep focus, the two boys small against the vast broken mountainside.
Lighting: flat cool overcast daylight, pale grey sky, the first fine drizzle in the air, muted desaturated palette.
Style: rendered as a 3D animated feature film still — stylized appealing proportions with large expressive eyes, soft global illumination, gentle subsurface scattering on the skin, clean detailed materials, cinematic depth of field, warm-cool color contrast, high render quality.
16:9 widescreen framing, clean frame with no text, captions, subtitles, logos or watermarks.

frames.action: Амин говорит Тако: ко мне на спину, держись крепко.
frames.dialogue: АМИН: Ко мне на спину. Держись крепко.
frames.prompt_en:
A medium close-up cinematic still frame from a 3D animated feature film.
Featuring Amin, a lean resolute teenage boy — exactly as in reference image 1; keep his face, hair and outfit identical to the reference. With him is Tako, a very small young boy swamped in an oversized jacket — exactly as in reference image 2; keep his face, hair and outfit identical to the reference.
Amin crouches and turns to Tako, steady and reassuring as he tells him to climb onto his back and hold on tight; Tako looks up frightened but trusting.
Setting: a narrow mountain gorge where a fallen wet tree trunk bridges the gap and a muddy torrent roars far below, overcast day (as in reference image 3).
Camera: eye-level medium close-up on the two boys framed from the chest up, shallow depth of field, the blurred gorge behind them.
Lighting: flat cool overcast daylight, damp misty air rising from the water, muted grey-green palette with cold shadows.
Style: rendered as a 3D animated feature film still — stylized appealing proportions with large expressive eyes, soft global illumination, gentle subsurface scattering on the skin, clean detailed materials, cinematic depth of field, warm-cool color contrast, high render quality.
16:9 widescreen framing, clean frame with no text, captions, subtitles, logos or watermarks.

frames.action: Тако вцепился в Амина и шепчет ему в ухо шутку про канатоходца.
frames.dialogue: ТАКО (в ухо Амину): Я как канатоходец. Только без каната. И без зонтика. И вообще без всего.
frames.prompt_en:
A tight close-up cinematic still frame from a 3D animated feature film.
Featuring Amin, a lean focused teenage boy — exactly as in reference image 1; keep his face, hair and outfit identical to the reference. Clinging to his back is Tako, a very small young boy in an oversized jacket — exactly as in reference image 2; keep his face, hair and outfit identical to the reference.
Tako clings tightly to Amin's back and whispers into his ear with a nervous, mischievous grin, while Amin crawls forward with jaw clenched in tense concentration.
Setting: a narrow mountain gorge where a fallen wet tree trunk bridges the gap and a muddy torrent roars far below, overcast day (as in reference image 3).

frames.action: Внутри хижины: маленький костёр, ветер в проломе крыши, изо ртов пар; трое сидят тесно спина к спине.

frames.prompt_en:
A wide shot cinematic still frame from a 3D animated feature film.
Featuring Amin, a lean teenage boy — exactly as in reference image 1; keep his face, hair and outfit identical to the reference. With him is Tako, a very small young boy in an oversized jacket — exactly as in reference image 2; keep his face, hair and outfit identical to the reference. And Yusuf, an older sturdy teenage boy — exactly as in reference image 3; keep his face, hair and outfit identical to the reference.
The three boys sit huddled tight back to back around a small fire on the floor, their breath steaming in the cold as wind pushes through a gap in the roof; weary but enduring.
Setting: inside a half-ruined stone shepherd's hut at night, a small fire on the floor and wind whistling through a gap in the roof (as in reference image 4).
Camera: slightly high wide shot taking in the whole hut interior, deep focus, the boys small and central around the fire.
Lighting: warm flickering firelight from below on the faces, deep cold blue shadows filling the stone walls, high contrast night atmosphere.
Style: rendered as a 3D animated feature film still — stylized appealing proportions with large expressive eyes, soft global illumination, gentle subsurface scattering on the skin, clean detailed materials, cinematic depth of field, warm-cool color contrast, high render quality.
16:9 widescreen framing, clean frame with no text, captions, subtitles, logos or watermarks.
